memory-saver.description: Saves session context to ChromaDB memory

save.template:
Save the current session to ChromaDB memory.

Run: python C:\Users\Admin\.shokunin\scripts\chroma-helper.py session list 3

Then: python C:\Users\Admin\.shokunin\scripts\chroma-helper.py save "SESSION SUMMARY

## Decisions
- (list 3-7 key decisions)

## Files
- (list 3-7 files modified)

## Commands
- (list 3-5 important commands)" auto session_end "session-end" "shokunin"
save.description: Save current session to ChromaDB memory

load.template:
Load a previous session from ChromaDB.

List: python C:\Users\Admin\.shokunin\scripts\chroma-helper.py session list 5

Continue: python C:\Users\Admin\.shokunin\scripts\chroma-helper.py session continue <session_id>
load.description: Load a previous session from ChromaDB
